JARVIS Voice Assistant can help you with your daily tasks on web

Introducing JARVIS Voice Assistant - for PC: Your Personal Digital Marvel

JARVIS Voice Assistant - for PC is your all-in-one digital companion designed to make your everyday life easier and more exciting. With a touch of Tony Stark flair, JARVIS Voice Assistant - for PC boasts an impressive array of features:

1. Time and Date Guru: Ask Jarvis for the current time, date, and day, or even inquire about specific days like today, yesterday, and tomorrow. It can also provide insights into the year, next year, and last year with precision.

2. Knowledge and Engagement: Jarvis is a fountain of knowledge, ready to answer your basic questions, engage in conversations, and keep you informed.

3. Instant Access: Seamlessly open websites, launch the calculator app, start Spotify for your favorite tunes, access Visual Studio Code for coding, or even connect with friends on WhatsApp, all at your command.

4. Weather Wizard: Get real-time weather updates, including temperature and Air Quality Index (AQI), so you're always prepared for the day ahead.

5. Personalization: Feel like a tech genius as you customize your AI assistant's name, giving it a unique identity that suits your style and preferences.

JARVIS Voice Assistant - for PC is your ticket to streamlined productivity, entertainment, and information, all while enjoying a touch of Tony Stark's brilliance. It's time to embrace the future with your own digital marvel!

Shows today's date in the Badíʿ (Wondrous) calendar, the official calendar of the Bahá'í Faith.

This extension displays the date in the Badíʿ (Wondrous) calendar where you are, automatically determining sunset times. Days in the Badíʿ calendar start and end at sunset.

The icon in the toolbar is subtle but keeps you informed of the current date in the Badíʿ calendar. By clicking on the icon, more detailed information is shown. Some things you can view or do:

- Copy the current date in a variety of formats, for use in other places.

- View the Badíʿ date for any day of any year - what was the date on your birthday?

- Set reminders before/after sunrise and sunset. Have your computer announce them out loud!

- View a list of dates for upcoming Feasts and Holy Days.

- View a full calendar (in Gregorian or Badíʿ layout) appropriate for printing.

- View the Fast times for your location.

- Export an iCal file with Badíʿ dates, for import into any calendar system.

- Get a list of special dates for planning years into the future.

- Design your own custom date formats.

- Trigger IFFF actions or Zapier webhooks according to Badíʿ dates or sunrise/set times.

See the website linked below for complete details and history.

Please view the Support tab and submit Suggestions on how this extension could be improved! If you can help translate the extension into your language, please let me know! Current languages are shown below.

Author: Glen Little (Calgary, Canada)
Free Google Maps Route Optimization by Upper
Transform your list of stops to optimized routes right in Google Maps for free.

Upper’s extension allows you to optimize multi-stop routes straight in Google Maps without switching windows or copy pasting addresses. 

To get the shortest route on Google Maps, simply add upto 10 stops in Google Maps, and click on Upper’s extension. Select Optimize and you are done. Upper’s advanced algorithm does all the hard work for you, allowing you to spend time on other activities. 

Save hours of planning time and spend less on fuel with Upper.

About Upper:

Upper is a route management software designed for all kinds of businesses: delivery, field service and maintenance, and for fleets of all sizes. With Upper, solo drivers as well as teams operate in a streamlined manner.

UYAP Avukat Portalı e-Duruşma talep formuna otomatik metin ekler

e-Duruşma Metin Girici, UYAP Avukat Portalı üzerinden e-duruşma talebi oluştururken talep metnini hızlıca girmenizi sağlayan bir Chrome uzantısıdır.

E-duruşma talep formundaki metin alanına her seferinde aynı ifadeleri tekrar yazmak yerine, hazır gerekçe şablonlarından birini seçip tek tıkla forma aktarabilirsiniz. Eklenti, e-duruşma talep penceresi açıldığında otomatik olarak form içine yerleşir; ekstra bir işlem yapmanız gerekmez.

Gizlilik ve Güvenlik:

Eklenti yalnızca avukat.uyap.gov.tr adresinde aktif olur. Konum bilgisi yalnızca "İl Dışı" gerekçesi seçildiğinde ve kullanıcı izni ile kullanılır; hiçbir sunucuya gönderilmez. Kişisel veri toplanmaz, dışarıya veri aktarılmaz.

Gerekli İzinler:

Konum (geolocation) — İl dışı gerekçesinde bulunduğunuz ili otomatik belirlemek için. Depolama (storage) — Konum izni verilmediğinde manuel il tercihini hatırlamak için.

At Vayutab, access the best of the internet—latest news, weather, web search, mail, and more, curated for you.

Install VayuTab Extension for quick access to latest news, most visited sites, web search, weather and more.

Vayutab is a dynamic website and browser extension that gives you quick access to the latest news, popular websites, and essential updates like weather - all in one convenient place. Compatible with Chrome, Mozilla Firefox, Microsoft Edge, Safari, and other browsers, Vayutab seamlessly integrates into your daily routine to keep you informed and up to date.

By installing the Vayutab extension, you’ll enjoy an upgraded browsing experience. Get headlines from top news outlets, check the forecast, and effortlessly search the web - without missing a beat. You can also customize your new tab page to include your most visited sites, making it easier than ever to navigate your online world.   

Features: 
Smart News: Trending headlines, always up-to-date
News Categories: Videos, Sports, Films, Food, Lifestyle, Games, Celebrity, Money/Finance, Politics, Auto, Education, Opinion
Web Search: Powered by leading search engines
Live Weather: Accurate, localized forecasts at a glance
Curated Videos: Engaging content from top creators
Quick Links: One-click access to your favorite sites
Trending Sites: Discover popular online destinations
Email Access: Seamlessly check your inbox
Custom Themes: Choose your preferred light or dark mode.
Dynamic Backgrounds: Fresh, beautiful visuals, daily or on demand.

Note: For the best experience, after installing ‘Vayutab’ click the ‘Keep it’ button on the ‘Change back to Google’ notification. This will show ‘Vayutab’ on each new tab as intended. 

By installing this extension, you agree to the: 
Terms of Service at: https://vayutab.com/terms-and-condition
Privacy Statement: https://vayutab.com/privacy-policy
Website: https://vayutab.com
Support: https://vayutab.com/contact-us

The New Tab That Gives Back

Transform your browser’s new tab page into a powerful productivity hub while helping provide clean water to those in need. With Elliot for Water, you can customise your browser with productivity tools and widgets and help communities worldwide gain access to safe drinking water.

Features:
● Impact Tracking: Track your personal impact on water donations and see the entire Elliot for Water community’s contribution. Easily share your impact across social media to inspire others.
● To-Do List: Stay organized! Add, edit, and complete tasks with the option to see the entire list or focus on one task at a time.
● Most Visited Links: Quick access to your frequently visited websites, with two affiliate links that support water initiatives.
● Customizable Links: Personalize your list of go-to websites and organize them for easy access.
● Boost Your Impact: Increase your contribution by watching ad videos or viewing banner ads—100% optional, but every ad helps fund water projects.
● Focus of the Day: Set and display your daily focus to stay on track with your goals.
● Beautiful backgrounds: Enjoy a beautiful and inspiring background!
● Search Engine Selection: Choose from multiple search engines, including Bing,
Google, DuckDuckGo, and Ecosia.
● Time & Weather: Stay updated with the current time and local weather, right on your
new tab.
● Inspiring Quotes: Get a daily dose of inspiration and share uplifting quotes with friends
across social media.
● Donate Button: Want to do more? Use the dedicated donate button to support clean
water projects directly.

Why Elliot for Water?
By simply browsing the web, you can help bring clean drinking water to underserved communities. 20% of our revenue goes directly toward funding sustainable water projects worldwide. Download Elliot for Water and make a global impact with just one click. It’s productivity with a purpose!

Add Lokalyze to your browser today and you’ll be supporting your local economy, helping your nearby retailers and sticking 2 fingers up to the billionaire space cowboys of the world, all at the same time!

Lokalyze is the clever little extension that recognises when you’re browsing for retail items on major e-commerce websites like Amazon, eBay & Alibaba, and will pop up automatically to show your local stores that sell the same and similar items.

The choice to buy locally or not is then up to you - don’t worry we won’t judge. The important thing is that you and millions like you around the world will finally be your giving local, physical retailers visibility alongside the remote online giants, and no doubt you’ll find yourself choosing to buy from your local stores more than you might think.

In case you needed more convincing here’s 5 benefits to shopping locally rather than ‘globally’:
- Spending locally directly supports your local economy and neighborhood.
- Reduce waste & pollution from delivery vehicles & packaging.
- Friendly & informative service.
- Get those steps in.
- Get the item you want right away.
Seznam autobusů and vagonWEB formations for transit maps
Adds links to Seznam-autobusů.cz and vagonWEB and downloads ČD train formations to traffic maps of Czech transit companies.

Specific support:
PMDP – Seznam autobusů (Bus List) link and location button
SŽ – button for vagonWEB and a link to ČD train details
PID – button for vagonWEB, ČD train formations and link to ČD train details
Jikord – button for DPČB Bus List, button for vagonWEB, ČD train formation and link to ČD train details
JMK – button for vagonWEB, replacement of ŽelPage button
DÚK – link to vagonWEB
DPMD – link to Bus List
ŽSR – link to vagonWEB

Parts of the code are inspired by the extension Řazení ČD pro Interaktivní mapu a GRAPP by Kateřina Miháliková (https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/bjomckdmonhmampoglcppieincjighce).

WS | ZIMO | Official Website | The Ultimate URL Shortening Service.

WS by ZIMO is the ultimate URL shortening solution, designed to make your links faster, smarter, and more secure. Instantly transform long web addresses into sleek, shareable WS links or expressive ZIMOJI's - perfect for businesses, marketers, and everyday users who value simplicity and performance.

With just one click of the WS Extension, you can create a shortened link in seconds. Your full link history is saved automatically in the History section of your Chrome Extension, so you can easily revisit, reuse, or track every link you’ve shared.

Watch your performance in real time with live click counters. Stay in control with real-time click tracking and powerful analytics that show you exactly how your links perform. Create custom aliases, access detailed statistics, and enjoy seamless redirection - all designed to maximise engagement and insight.


Key Features

•	Free to use
•	No registration required
•	Secure links - AES 256-bit encryption ensures complete safety
•	Automatic copy - shortened links are copied directly to your clipboard
•	Share - swift and seamless sharing across all major platforms
•	Real-time statistics - live URL click counters and detailed analytics
•	Right click - create shortened WS links
•	Dynamic meta information - includes title, description, images, gifs and videos
•	Date and time stamping - for all WS links
•	One-click redirection - to WS by ZIMO (https://zimo.ws)
•	Full history management - with deletion options
•	Instant notifications - on updates and new features
•	Keyboard shortcut - set a custom keyboard shortcut to create shortened WS links
•	WhatsApp Integration - WS by ZIMO | WhatsApp Edition
•	Telegram Integration - WS by ZIMO | Telegram Edition

Experience a faster, smarter and more secure way to share links with this powerful Chrome extension. Completely free to use and requiring no registration, it delivers instant convenience from the moment you install it. Every shortened link is protected with robust AES 256-bit encryption, ensuring total security, while automatic copying places the generated link directly onto your clipboard for immediate use.

Sharing becomes effortlessly seamless across all major platforms, supported by real-time statistics that provide live click counts and detailed analytics to help you track performance at a glance. Create WS links instantly from your browser with a simple right-click, and enjoy rich, dynamic meta information - including titles, descriptions, images, GIFs and videos - embedded into every link.

Each WS link is precisely date and time stamped, and one-click redirection takes you straight to WS by ZIMO (https://zimo.ws) whenever you need it. A full history management dashboard lets you review or delete past links with ease, while instant notifications keep you informed about updates and new features. For even greater speed, set your own custom keyboard shortcut and generate shortened WS links in a fraction of a second.

Turn your browser into an AI powered astrology app.

Celesti isn't just another "horoscope of the day" widget; it's a complete, professional-grade astrological toolset powered by lightning-fast, offline calculations.  Whether you're a seasoned professional astrologer or just starting to explore your natal chart, Celesti brings the cosmos to your browser with unparalleled speed and beauty.


For the Modern Enthusiast:

Real-Time World Clock: See a beautiful, dynamic chart of the sky right now, calculated for your exact location.

AI-Powered Horoscope Interpretations: Get insightful, detailed explanations for your planets, aspects, and houses. Understand what it all means.

Real-Time Horoscope Notifications: Get notified of changes in the sky in real-time, and learn what they mean with our AI interpreter.

Lunar & Eclipse Tracker: Instantly find upcoming New/Full Moons and search a 5,000-year database for any solar or lunar eclipse.



For the Professional Astrologer:

High-Precision Ephemeris: Powered by the milnesian.ephem.js library, our calculations are fast, precise, and run entirely offline from a multi-gigabyte installed database.

12+ House Systems: Go beyond Placidus. Select from Whole Sign, Porphyry, Regiomontanus, Koch, Campanus, and more to match your practice.

Full Planet & Asteroid Support: Track all major planets, luminaries, nodes, and key asteroids (Chiron, Ceres, Pallas, Juno, Vesta).

Natal Chart Management: Create, save, and manage an unlimited* library of natal charts for yourself, your friends, family, or clients.

Advanced Timelapse Control: Move through time with our transit calculator. Skip by the second, day, month, or week to see planetary movements unfold.



Fast, Private, and Offline-First

Celesti is different. All your personal data—especially your natal charts—is stored only on your computer. Nothing is ever uploaded to a server.

Our "lightning-fast" calculations are possible because the entire NASA JPL ephemeris and city database is installed locally on your machine. Your charts are 100% private and load instantly.



Free Version:

Real-Time World Clock
Your Personal Natal Chart + 1 extra saved chart
Daily limits on AI interpretations, eclipse/phase searches, and time skips.
Real time astrology notifications for Sun, Moon and Planets.


Celesti Pro (Paid Upgrade):

Unlimited Natal Chart saving
Unlimited AI Interpretations
Unlimited Eclipse/Phase searches and Timelapse skips
Unlock all 12+ House Systems
Customize Orbs & Planets
All future feature updates are included!
Real time astrology notifications for Sun, Moon and Planets and asteroids!

Install Celesti today and turn your browser into a true window to the cosmos.

Automatically collect offers, analyze best deals, and remind you to redeem — smarter cashback makes saving easy.

🛍️ GetCashback.ai – Your Cashback Copilot

Automatically collect offers, analyze best deals, and remind you to redeem — smarter cashback makes saving easy.

All in one lightweight, privacy-first Chrome extension.

🚀 What It Does

Every year, millions in cashback rewards go unclaimed — buried in banking portals, lost in fine print, or simply forgotten.

GetCashback.ai is your AI-powered savings sidekick that keeps your offers organized, your timing perfect, and your cashback flowing.

🔍 Collect

When you're logged into supported financial institutions, GetCashback.ai detects your session, fetches all available cashback offers, and activates them for you — automatically.

🙅‍♂️ No card linking
🙅‍♀️ No usernames or passwords
🔒 100% local, secure, and private

📊 Analyze

After collecting your offers, GetCashback.ai reads the fine prints and organizes them by merchant, deal type, and redemption method — with built-in search, filters, and smart sorting by estimated value, expiration date, or effort to redeem.

It’s everything you need to cut through the clutter and focus on the offers that actually make a difference.

Want more?

🔍 Spot the best deal by searching merchant names and comparing active offers
📊 Export your data and plug it into your favorite AI for personalized recommendations

🔔 Redeem

Once you start your shopping spree, GetCashback.ai keeps you covered — sending real-time reminders while you're on the merchant’s site, so you don’t forget to use your cashback offers.
After checkout, log how much you spent, and GetCashback.ai will show you how much cashback is coming your way.

🛑 No more “dang, I had an offer for that.”
💥 Just smart nudges that turn good intentions into actual savings.


✨ Major Features
🛡️ Privacy-first: data stays on your device, and you’re always in control
🧠 Auto-collect widget that activates and fetches cashback offers as you browse
🔔 Real-time reminders while shopping online, so you never forget to use an offer
🛍️ Redeem online offers directly from your dashboard with one click
🗺️ Interactive map to discover local in-store cashback opportunities
🔢 One-glance badge view — see how many offers have been collected right from the extension icon
🔍 Search, filter, sort, and compare offers to find the best deal from any merchant
📊 Personalized value estimates based on your intended spending by category
📦 Export your data to analyze on your own or feed into your favorite AI
💳 No card or account linking — works directly inside your logged-in bank sessions

✅ Why Use It?

✔️ Actually use the cashback you're already eligible for
✔️ Save money without changing your shopping habits
✔️ Lightweight, secure, and easy to use
✔️ Not affiliated with any bank — we work only for you

Start turning forgotten rewards into real savings.

Install GetCashback.ai today — and make every purchase count.

Salah Reminder - Never Miss a Prayer! 🕌

An extension made for Devpost that can change time within 50 timezones, bookmark favorite events & quickly search out new events

Participating in an event & turning an idea into reality can be very difficult and cumbersome sometimes. To ease that pressure and let you just focus on your project to give it a real shape, is the real motto of this extension.

It is an extension made for the participants, by a  participant, with love & keeping all things in mind that can somehow ease the project development phase.

So, let's dive into the major functioning of the extension:

⭕ As I am from India and whenever I participate in any event, mostly it is based in the western part of the world (like UK, USA) and I know that the TIMEZONES conversions are a pain in the head because adding 10 hours 30 minutes to your timezone to get the idea of deadline is very tough. I know Google Calendar is there, but it doesn't fulfill the need because the calendar reminder doesn't help us in either knowing how much time is left in the deadline, and neither intimates us at regular intervals. In short, it's hard to deal with the GMT OFFSETS. To ease the conversion process, I have programmed this extension in such a way that it can help you in converting the timezones from a choice of 50 timezones that cover almost every part of the world. 

A deadline date & time is present on the Overview page of every event, but the problem is that it is in the organization company's timezone. And if you are a participant from India/USA/Colombia/Brazil and you want to participate in a UK-based event you can use the extension to get the timezones converted to your selected timezone & that even with the help of a click. I haven't used any API for this. I figured out and did the mathematical computation for converting a timezone into other using the GMT offset and I am proud that it works fine with any input.

🔴 On Devpost, for an event, there is a schedule given, that contains important dates for submission, judging & the declaration of the result. The extension can also convert all of those dates to your required timezone

⚫ Apart from the life-saving timezones conversion, as you will use the extension, you will notice that it will also change the prize money 💰 to the currency that is being used in the selected timezone. Whenever we first check out an event, the total prize amount of the event affects our minds a lot and becomes a deciding factor. But it has the same problem as that of timezone, the rate is in some other denomination from where we will be living. For example, as I am from India and if I am converting details of a US-based event, then the extension will not only change the EST/PST timezone to IST but will also convert the amount of the prize in Indian Rupees from $ (which was initially present). So, the extension is smart enough to extract that INR is being used in India & automatically does the conversions.

⚪  For the currency conversion, I have used Exchange Rate API as it gives accurate currency conversion. We all know that RATE LIMITING is one of the problems while using any 3rd-part API and as a plethora of participants will use the devpost platform regularly, that means many will also use this extension. And if on every iteration, I will be calling the API, then there are high chances that within a couple of minutes of usage, I will be hitting that rate limit and the extension will altogether stop working. So, to completely take RATE LIMITING out of the picture, I have ensured that for a user, the extension will fetch the currency rates data once a day (because they are updated in the API itself, once a day) and the new set of data will be fetched next day. Thus ensuring that there are a limited number of API calls being made. 

🟠 Conversion aspect is great, but this extension has a lot more to offer. There are a few events that draw one's attention in a moment and we want to keep track of those. Currently, if we have to do so on Devpost, we have to participate in that event and then only the event will be pinned up. But this extension lets you bookmark up to 5 events and they can be viewed/accessed by the user anytime from the browser and you don't have to either open the devpost site or even enroll in that event. You got to 👀 what you like. Not just they are added, but they contain information regarding the event like the name, organizing company, deadline, prize & the devpost page link for that event. You can directly hop onto the devpost's event page from the extension whenever you like.

🟡 Searching new events according to the various tags is now way easier, more accessible & cooler than ever before. Open the extension and you can see the 4 tags that show various options for things like LOCATION, STATUS, LENGTH & INTERESTS. If you want to switch the content of the tag, you can do so by clicking on any of the tags & the content will change. Once satisfied with the tag's contents, click on the ORANGE button to search for the required events. 

And boom, the search query will be made and you can just view the results that you got for your constructed choices. It is obvious that for a combination of 4 tags, the results will be limited. In that case, you can click on a tag with keeping the CONTROL key pressed and that will search for the particular tag. Say, you want to search for the AI/ML events, so firstly make sure that you toggle the last tag content to AI/ML (with the Ctrl key being not pressed) and then click on the tag, keeping the Ctrl key pressed and boom, you will be shown the results for the particular choice.

🟣 You can use the REMIND checkbox to instruct the extension to remind you about those events that will be ending in 10 days. Just check the remind option and whenever the extension will find that there are less than 10 days left in an event, that event box will be highlighted and the chrome text-to-speech service will speak out regarding the same. Anytime, you wish to stop the tts, just switch off the reminder option.

⏺ The clipboard icon can be used to copy the information of all of your bookmarked events and that will open the WhatsApp window in the browser through which you can just share your go-to-events with your contact or even send on WhatsApp to show your friends that which events are you participating in. The text is tailored for Whatsapp & will ensure that the events are exported most elegantly.

🟤 A well-made project can't be completed without great error handling and the same I have done with this project. I have covered all the edge cases and the error divisions will pop out as you make mistakes while using the extension.

Don't forget to catch up with the social sites of Devpost present in the extension's footer.

There is a lot to be explored in the extension and a lot to be benefitted of. Use the extension to the fullest and make something great 🎉
Discover personalized savings in your neighborhood!

Save all potential purchases in one place with the universal Visinity shopping bag extension. Shop across multiple online stores and add all your potential purchases to your Visinity bag to access later. Download our app to get updates when your saved items are on sale or in stock near you!
Invert colors on pages with an option to exclude media.

Inversion — Smart Dark Mode intelligently transforms bright websites into a comfortable dark mode, automatically after sunset and only on the pages you choose.

Unlike basic invert tools, Inversion is context-aware, adjustable, and fully controllable per site.
1. Automatically enable dark mode after sunset based on your location
2. Adjustable offset (default: 30 minutes after sunset)
3. Works from after sunset until sunrise
4. Per-site modes: Auto, On, Off
5. Enable dark mode only on the websites you choose
6. Whitelist and blacklist support using simple patterns such as: example.com *.google.com docs
Auto mode can be gated by list rules, while explicit per-site choices always take priority.
Smart page detection
7. Auto mode activates only on white-ish pages
8. Prevents unwanted inversion on sites that are already dark
9. Uses computed page backgrounds and viewport sampling

Fully adjustable
1. Strength slider from subtle to strong inversion
2. Strength is saved per site, with a global default
3. Optional “Don’t invert media” setting keeps images, videos, canvas, SVGs, and embeds looking normal

Fast control
1. Keyboard shortcut: Ctrl + Shift + Y (Mac: Cmd + Shift + Y)
2. Instantly cycle site mode without opening the popup

Syncs everywhere
1. Settings are stored using Chrome Sync
2. Your preferences follow you across devices

Privacy-first
1. No accounts
2. No ads
3. No tracking
4. Location is used only if you enable Auto mode and only to calculate local sunrise and sunset
5. No data is sent anywhere

Perfect for late-night reading, documentation, dashboards, and any bright website that causes eye strain after dark.

A proof-of-concept Chrome Extension developed with Webpack and Svelte

The extension provides four simple features:

- Search a selected text in a private search engine.
- Scrape a page to obtain all URLs and e-mail addresses.
- Show a random joke (obtained from a public API) in a notification.
- Open Google Maps showing your current location.
Displays weather data based on user's location.

Simply displays your weather temperature and wind speed across all your tabs.

- Display window is movable (drag and position)
- Display window turns transparent when your mouse is not over it
- Refreshes every 10 minutes for accurate data
- NEEDS location permission on chrome to work

Privacy-preserving identity verification using zero-knowledge proofs. Prove claims about yourself without revealing personal data.

ZK Vault: Prove Anything, Reveal Nothing

Your Privacy, Cryptographically Guaranteed

ZK Vault is a privacy-first browser extension that lets you prove claims about yourself without exposing personal information. Using cutting-edge zero-knowledge cryptography, verify your country, email domain, and other attributes while keeping your data completely private.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🔐 HOW IT WORKS

ZK Vault uses zero-knowledge proofs to verify claims without revealing underlying data:

1. Generate Proofs - Create cryptographic proofs of your attributes (country, email domain) locally in your browser
2. Store Securely - All proofs are stored in your browser only - nothing is sent to servers
3. Share Selectively - Websites can request proofs with your permission - you control what to share and when

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

✨ KEY FEATURES

🌍 Country Verification
Prove your country without revealing your exact location or IP address
• Uses IP-based geolocation to determine country, then generates a cryptographic proof
• Only country code is revealed - your coordinates and IP stay completely private
• Real zero-knowledge cryptography, not just hidden data

📧 Email Domain Verification
Prove your email domain (e.g., @gmail.com, @university.edu) without exposing your full email address
• Uses DKIM signatures for cryptographic verification
• Your email is never uploaded or stored - processed locally and immediately deleted
• Perfect for student discounts, company verification, or gated communities

🔒 Real Cryptography
Built on battle-tested zero-knowledge technology
• Groth16 ZK-SNARKs on BN254 elliptic curve
• Same cryptographic primitives used by major blockchain projects
• Not mock proofs - actual verifiable cryptography that can't be forged

🛡️ 100% Private
Your data never leaves your device. Period.
• All proof generation happens locally in your browser using WebAssembly
• No accounts, no registration, no tracking, no telemetry
• We don't operate servers - there's nothing to collect your data
• Open source - verify our privacy claims yourself

👤 Permission System
You're in complete control
• Websites must request permission before accessing your proofs
• See exactly what data will be shared before approving
• Revoke permissions anytime from extension settings
• Per-website isolation - proofs shared with one site don't leak to others

🧑‍💻 Website Integration
Built for developers
• Simple JavaScript API for requesting proofs
• Auto-registration flow for seamless user onboarding
• Works with any backend or framework
• Comprehensive documentation and examples

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🛡️ PRIVACY GUARANTEES

What ZK Vault DOES:
✅ Generate cryptographic proofs locally in your browser
✅ Store proofs in local browser storage only
✅ Let you share proofs with websites you explicitly trust
✅ Give you full control over your identity data
✅ Use real zero-knowledge cryptography (Groth16 ZK-SNARKs)

What ZK Vault DOES NOT:
❌ Upload your data to any servers
❌ Track your browsing history or behavior
❌ Share data with third parties
❌ Require accounts, registration, or login
❌ Collect analytics, telemetry, or usage data

What Each Proof Reveals:

Country Proof
• Reveals: Country code only (e.g., "US")
• Hidden: Exact coordinates, IP address, city, state, region
• How: IP geolocation determines country, then ZK proof is generated locally

Email Domain Proof
• Reveals: Email domain only (e.g., "gmail.com")
• Hidden: Full email address, inbox content, email metadata
• How: DKIM signature verification + ZK proof generation (email processed in memory for 30-60s, then immediately deleted)

🎯 USE CASES

Anonymous Forums & Communities
Build trust without sacrificing anonymity
• Verify users are from allowed countries without collecting personal information
• Require proof of email domain (e.g., only @company.com) without storing emails
• Create verified-anonymous spaces for whistleblowers, activists, or sensitive discussions

Gated Access & Verification
Control access without invasive data collection
• Restrict content based on location without IP blocking or VPNs breaking your site
• Verify educational email domains (@.edu) for student discounts
• Age-restricted content without government IDs or facial recognition

Privacy-First Applications
Build apps that respect user privacy from the ground up
• Comply with GDPR/CCPA by not collecting unnecessary personal data
• Give users cryptographic control over their identity
• Reduce data breach risk - you can't leak data you never collected

Decentralized Identity
Move beyond the username/password paradigm
• Cryptographically provable claims without centralized identity providers
• Compatible with Web3 and decentralized applications
• Users own their identity data, not platforms

Corporate & Enterprise
Verify employees or partners without exposing PII
• Confirm employee email domains without collecting full email addresses
• Location verification for distributed teams
• Privacy-preserving access control for internal tools

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🚀 HOW TO USE

For Users:

Generate a Country Proof:
1. Click the ZK Vault extension icon
2. Go to "Proofs" tab
3. Click "Country" to generate a country proof
4. The extension detects your country from IP and generates a cryptographic proof
5. Your proof is stored locally and can be shared with websites

Generate an Email Domain Proof:
1. Click the ZK Vault extension icon
2. Go to "Proofs" tab
3. Click "Email Domain"
4. Download a .eml file from Gmail (Show original → Download original)
5. Upload the .eml file to the extension
6. Wait 30-60 seconds for proof generation
7. Your email domain proof is ready (your email address is never stored)

For Developers:

Integrate ZK Vault into your website with just a few lines of code:

// Check if user has ZK Vault installed
if (window.zkVault?.isInstalled()) {
  // Request a country proof
  const result = await window.zkVault.requestProof({
    type: 'country',
    autoRegister: true,
    backendUrl: 'https://yoursite.com/api/register'
  });
  
  // User is now verified!
  console.log('Country:', result.proof.publicInputs.countryCode);
}

Full API documentation: https://github.com/Cosmos-Harry/zk-vault

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🔧 TECH STACK

• Zero-Knowledge Proofs: arkworks (Groth16, BN254)
• WASM: wasm-bindgen
• Geolocation: ip-api.com
• Email Verification: DKIM signature parsing
• Frontend: Vanilla JavaScript, Tailwind CSS
• Extension: Chrome Extension Manifest V3
